assets.name: lecture_07_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 02 gives the best balance between visible board content and minimal occlusion. The left-hand \(E\) is still readable, the upper reminder line beginning with \(\log Z\) remains visible, and the key right-hand identification with \(1/\beta\) is clearer than in the other frames. The mathematics is still partly blocked by the lecturer, so this screenshot is best used alongside a cleaned typeset equation.
